name: WELLTOWER INC.
business: Welltower is a real estate investment trust focusing on rental housing for aging seniors across the United States, United Kingdom, and Canada, with a portfolio of seniors housing, wellness housing, and post-acute care communities.

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio predominantly consists of 2,500+ seniors and wellness housing communities that are positioned at the intersection of housing and hospitality, creating vibrant communities for mature renters and older adults.
We are integrating AI into our data science platform to assist in analyzing and extracting more insights from our internal documents.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Amica Senior Lifestyles portfolio closing
catalysts.sentence: The portfolio will be operated by Amica Senior Lifestyles and is expected to close in early 2026, subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals.

catalysts.event: Disposition of outpatient medical properties tranches closing
catalysts.sentence: The disposition will occur in tranches expected to close through mid-2026.
